description.en_US: Contact/address book plugin. Multi-phone/email, group tags, sort & filter. Avatar support. Type /name to insert a contact link, /add-contact to quick-add. Top bar + toggleable FAB. Auto-refresh on open. Click phone to copy. Read-only docs. Full i18n.
description.zh_CN: 通讯录插件。多号码、多邮箱、分组标签、排序筛选、头像支持。输入/名字插入链接，/add-contact 快速添加。顶部栏 + 可切换浮动按钮。打开自动刷新。点击号码复制。文档只读保护。完整中英文。
description.default: Contact/address book plugin. Multi-phone/email, group tags, sort & filter, avatar. Type /name for link, /add-contact to add. Top bar + toggleable FAB. Auto-refresh. Click to copy. Read-only docs.
